title: Lazy Basil Bliss
description: A dense and herbal Kenyan dish featuring basil leaves in a marinated mixture that's perfect for lazy Sunday mornings, suitable for those on a low FODMAP diet.

ingredients.name: ginger, finely grated
ingredients.notes: fresh or dried can be used

instructions: In a large pot, combine chicken broth and olive oil. Add finely grated ginger.
Heat the mixture over medium heat until the oil is hot but not smoking.
Add basil leaves to the pot and stir gently to prevent burning.
Reduce heat to low and let simmer for 15 minutes or until the liquid has slightly reduced, adjusting seasoning with salt as needed.
Turn off heat and serve warm as a snack or side dish.
